title: The Depths of Impel Down: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are you guards!? Where are we!!?

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: It's starting....!! Check out the stage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did you sleep well, candy boy...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mmmm? You've done well... getting here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Liquor, weapons, games, and most import-tantly...

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: NNN-Fufu... this is... not hell. Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Ivankov
dialogue.text: QUEEN IVA, ARE YOU ALL RIGHT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: to my new kama land!! H!!!HA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OHHHH~ MY!! YOU'VE HEARD OF ME!?
